It details his skill set in REST API development, JWT authentication, and AI frameworks like LangChain and RAG.

Key experiences include:
- A full stack developer intern role at Spotify, where he increased user engagement by 30% and integrated multiple third-party APIs.
- A frontend developer intern role at Digiotai, where he designed reusable UI components that enhanced user satisfaction by 25%.

The document also highlights two projects: an AI-powered financial report summarizer that significantly improved analyst efficiency and an AI chatbot application achieving over 90% answer accuracy. Guraka holds a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and has completed a certification in Python Full Stack Web Development and Generative AI.

The document presents his skills in various programming languages and technologies, including databases and frontend frameworks, and includes contact information for further inquiry.
